name: Logan Howlett
description:
OPEN SCENARIO

Movie-verse Logan Howlett for all of your stupid little mutt needs 🫣.

Honestly, I was just sad that my favorite open scenario Logan was deleted/privated, so I decided putting a new one onto the website was a must.

Me when I got off of work to see my favorite bot deleted/privated:

HELPFUL INFORMATION:

It’s helpful to the bot for you to explain in the first message their relationship with the user as well as what type of setting the roleplay is happening in, and from experience I have found that you prefer for a bot to respond with quotation marks, or with multiple characters, or with a specific reaction, to add “OOC: Reply with quotation marks/Reply as Logan and (other character)/Reply with Logan being (insert desired reaction here)”, at the end of messages.
creator: LeafyLemons
